title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Office Parks REIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Office Parks REIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
